typeChart._doc: Super effective = 2.0, Self-resist = 0.5, Unlisted = 1.0. Each type: 2 strengths, 2 weaknesses.

striker.name: Striker
striker.description: Reckless physical hitter. High ATK, fragile against magic.

mystic.name: Mystic
mystic.description: Devastating magic wielder. High SPATK, paper-thin armor.

guardian.name: Guardian
guardian.description: Immovable wall. High DEF, always acts last.

warden.name: Warden
warden.description: Magic sponge and team protector. High SPDEF, weak physical offense.

swift.name: Swift
swift.description: Always strikes first. Blazing SPD, fragile body.

titan.name: Titan
titan.description: Massive HP pool. Endures everything, but no magic offense.

channeler.name: Channeler
channeler.description: Endless spell fuel. Huge MP pool, physically exposed.

abilities.name: Attack
abilities.description: A basic physical strike

abilities.name: Tackle
abilities.description: Charges at the target with full body weight

abilities.name: Heal
abilities.description: Restores a moderate amount of HP

abilities.name: Guard
abilities.description: Raises guard, halving damage taken this turn

abilities.name: Focus
abilities.description: Concentrates energy, boosting magic power

abilities.name: Ember
abilities.description: Hurls a small fireball at the target

abilities.name: Flame Wave
abilities.description: Sends a wave of searing flames

abilities.name: Inferno
abilities.description: Engulfs the target in a raging inferno

abilities.name: Eruption
abilities.description: Volcanic fury erupts beneath all foes

abilities.name: Aqua Splash
abilities.description: Fires a jet of pressurized water

abilities.name: Tidal Surge
abilities.description: A forceful surge of oceanic energy

abilities.name: Deluge
abilities.description: Drowns the target in a torrent of water

abilities.name: Maelstrom
abilities.description: A devastating whirlpool engulfs all foes

abilities.name: Pebble Shot
abilities.description: Launches a volley of sharp stones

abilities.name: Quake
abilities.description: The ground shakes violently beneath the target

abilities.name: Landslide
abilities.description: A cascade of boulders buries the target

abilities.name: Tectonic Fury
abilities.description: The earth splits apart in cataclysmic upheaval

abilities.name: Gust
abilities.description: A sharp blade of wind slashes the target

abilities.name: Cyclone
abilities.description: A swirling vortex batters the target

abilities.name: Hurricane
abilities.description: Devastating winds tear at the target

abilities.name: Tempest
abilities.description: An apocalyptic storm annihilates everything

abilities.name: Spark
abilities.description: Zaps the target with a jolt of electricity

abilities.name: Thunderbolt
abilities.description: A powerful bolt of lightning strikes the target

abilities.name: Lightning Strike
abilities.description: A devastating arc of electricity

abilities.name: Thunder Storm
abilities.description: The sky unleashes cataclysmic lightning

abilities.name: Frost Shard
abilities.description: Launches a razor-sharp shard of ice

abilities.name: Blizzard
abilities.description: A freezing storm batters the target

abilities.name: Ice Lance
abilities.description: A massive spear of ice impales the target

abilities.name: Absolute Zero
abilities.description: All heat is ripped from the battlefield

abilities.name: Holy Spark
abilities.description: A burst of purifying light

abilities.name: Radiance
abilities.description: Brilliant rays of light sear the target

abilities.name: Judgment
abilities.description: A beam of divine judgment strikes down

abilities.name: Divine Light
abilities.description: The sun itself scorches all who oppose

abilities.name: Shadow Bolt
abilities.description: A missile of condensed darkness

abilities.name: Dark Pulse
abilities.description: A wave of malicious dark energy

abilities.name: Void Crush
abilities.description: The void constricts around the target

abilities.name: Oblivion
abilities.description: Reality unravels, consuming all in darkness

abilities.name: Power Strike
abilities.description: A devastating physical blow with high crit chance

abilities.name: Reckless Charge
abilities.description: An all-out charge that damages the user too

abilities.name: Mind Blast
abilities.description: A psychic shockwave that may confuse

abilities.name: Arcane Burst
abilities.description: Pure arcane energy that shreds magic resistance

abilities.name: Iron Wall
abilities.description: Hardens body to steel, massively raising DEF

abilities.name: Fortify
abilities.description: Fortifies both physical and magical defenses

abilities.name: Spirit Shield
abilities.description: Projects a magical barrier on an ally

abilities.name: Purify
abilities.description: Cleanses debuffs and restores some HP

abilities.name: Quick Strike
abilities.description: A lightning-fast strike that always goes first

abilities.name: Evasion
abilities.description: Heightens reflexes, greatly boosting dodge chance

abilities.name: Endure
abilities.description: Braces for impact — survives the next lethal hit with 1 HP

abilities.name: Crush
abilities.description: A bone-crushing blow that lowers the target's DEF

abilities.name: Meditate
abilities.description: Enters deep focus, restoring 30% of max MP

abilities.name: Siphon
abilities.description: Drains the target's magical energy

stages.name: Scorchling
stages.description: A fierce pup with ember-hot fangs that singe anything it bites

stages.name: Blazefang
stages.description: Its fangs burn white-hot, capable of melting steel on contact

stages.name: Pyrowulf
stages.description: An apex predator wreathed in living flame, feared across all biomes

stages.name: Candlemoth
stages.description: A small moth with wings that flicker like candle flames

stages.name: Flamewraith
stages.description: An ethereal being of pure flame that drifts through the night

stages.name: Pyrosphinx
stages.description: An ancient fire sphinx whose riddles burn as hot as its magic

stages.name: Cindershell
stages.description: A small crustacean with a shell of smoldering volcanic rock

stages.name: Lavaguard
stages.description: Its magma-infused shell absorbs blows and radiates intense heat

stages.name: Volcatrice
stages.description: A walking fortress of obsidian and lava, virtually indestructible

stages.name: Hearthling
stages.description: A gentle spirit that tends the warmth of home fires

stages.name: Ashwarden
stages.description: Cloaked in protective ash, it shields allies from magical harm

stages.name: Solsticent
stages.description: The embodiment of the summer sun's protective warmth

stages.name: Flickertail
stages.description: A tiny lizard that moves so fast it appears to teleport

stages.name: Flashfire
stages.description: Streaks across the battlefield as a blur of living fire

stages.name: Pyrovalon
stages.description: Faster than flame itself — strikes before opponents can blink

stages.name: Smolderpaw
stages.description: A bulky bear cub that constantly smolders with inner fire

stages.name: Charbull
stages.description: An enormous beast of charred hide that shrugs off most attacks

stages.name: Pyrotaur
stages.description: A colossal fire titan whose footsteps leave pools of magma

stages.name: Sparkwisp
stages.description: A floating ember that feeds on ambient magical energy

stages.name: Embermage
stages.description: Channels fire through an inexhaustible well of mana

stages.name: Pyrosage
stages.description: An ancient sage of flame whose spells never run dry

stages.name: Snapfin
stages.description: An aggressive fish with razor-sharp fins and a nasty bite

stages.name: Torrentjaw
stages.description: Its hydraulic jaws crush anything caught in their grip

stages.name: Maelstrix
stages.description: A fearsome sea predator that creates whirlpools with each strike

stages.name: Dewdrift
stages.description: A translucent jellyfish that drifts on currents of magic

stages.name: Mistweaver
stages.description: Weaves illusions from mist and moonlight

stages.name: Abyssoracle
stages.description: Sees all futures reflected in the deep — its magic is absolute

stages.name: Shellguard
stages.description: A clam-like creature with an impossibly hard pearlescent shell

stages.name: Reefsentry
stages.description: Encrusted with living coral, it forms a living barrier

stages.name: Tideguardian
stages.description: An ancient sentinel of the deep, armored in ocean-forged pearl

stages.name: Streamfoal
stages.description: A graceful foal born from crystal-clear mountain streams

stages.name: Tidestag
stages.description: Its antlers channel tidal energy to shield allies

stages.name: Oceanward
stages.description: Guardian of coasts and harbors, its presence calms any storm

stages.name: Splashtail
stages.description: A tiny eel that darts through water faster than the eye can track

stages.name: Ripcurrent
stages.description: Moves with the speed of ocean currents, striking from nowhere

stages.name: Aquavalor
stages.description: A blur of fins and spray — the fastest spirit in any ocean

stages.name: Gulptoad
stages.description: A rotund toad that can swallow prey twice its size

stages.name: Wavebreaker
stages.description: Its massive body parts the waves — nothing can move it

stages.name: Leviathos
stages.description: An ancient leviathan of unfathomable endurance

stages.name: Bubblite
stages.description: A bubble spirit that absorbs mana from the moisture in air

stages.name: Tidecaster
stages.description: Commands the tides with seemingly endless magical reserves

stages.name: Depthsage
stages.description: A deep-sea sage whose mana well is as boundless as the ocean

stages.name: Rockfang
stages.description: A tough canine with fangs of crystallized mineral

stages.name: Terraslash
stages.description: Its stone claws cleave through bedrock like butter

stages.name: Seismowulf
stages.description: Each pounce registers on seismographs — pure tectonic force

stages.name: Dustmoth
stages.description: A moth with wings of fine dust that shimmer with earth magic

stages.name: Sandswirl
stages.description: A swirling vortex of enchanted sand and ancient power

stages.name: Terravault
stages.description: Contains the compressed power of entire mountain ranges

stages.name: Claypact
stages.description: A small golem packed from dense, enchanted clay

stages.name: Bouldershield
stages.description: Its body is a wall of granite — nothing gets past

stages.name: Petracoloss
stages.description: A colossus of living stone, the ultimate defensive fortress

stages.name: Mossfoal
stages.description: A gentle fawn covered in soft, healing moss

stages.name: Stonestag
stages.description: Its antlers of petrified wood ward off hostile magic

stages.name: Gaiaward
stages.description: The living shield of the earth itself, impervious to sorcery

stages.name: Skitrock
stages.description: A small gecko that skitters across stone surfaces at blinding speed

stages.name: Terradash
stages.description: Tunnels through solid rock faster than most can run

stages.name: Quartzvalor
stages.description: A crystalline blur — strikes like a meteor and vanishes underground

stages.name: Mudmound
stages.description: A living pile of enchanted mud with surprising resilience

stages.name: Earthcrusher
stages.description: An enormous beast whose stomps crack the earth for miles

stages.name: Terratitan
stages.description: Mistaken for mountains, these ancient titans are nearly immortal

stages.name: Geomote
stages.description: A tiny spirit that resonates with the earth's ley lines

stages.name: Runecaster
stages.description: Inscribes ancient runes of power from an endless well of earth magic

stages.name: Terrasage
stages.description: A primordial sage whose magic draws from the planet's core

stages.name: Gustfang
stages.description: A wild pup that rides the wind to ambush its prey

stages.name: Galeclaw
stages.description: Its claws cut with the force of a gale-speed wind blade

stages.name: Tempestwulf
stages.description: A howling wolf of pure storm energy — its attacks are unavoidable

stages.name: Breezeling
stages.description: A tiny sylph that plays in summer breezes

stages.name: Cyclomist
stages.description: A whirling enigma of mist and wind magic

stages.name: Stormphantom
stages.description: An invisible storm spirit — felt, never seen, always devastating

stages.name: Windcurl
stages.description: A hedgehog-like spirit that curls into an impenetrable windball

stages.name: Aeroshield
stages.description: Generates a permanent cyclone barrier around itself

stages.name: Aegistorm
stages.description: An unbreachable fortress of compressed air and storm energy

stages.name: Zephyrfoal
stages.description: A playful deer born from gentle spring winds

stages.name: Galestag
stages.description: Its antlers scatter hostile spells like leaves in the wind

stages.name: Stormward
stages.description: Stands in the eye of any storm, protecting all who seek shelter

stages.name: Drafttail
stages.description: A hummingbird spirit that flits between moments

stages.name: Gustrunner
stages.description: Rides air currents at supersonic speed

stages.name: Hurricanex
stages.description: The fastest spirit ever recorded — it IS the wind

stages.name: Galebrute
stages.description: A hulking beast that breathes hurricane-force winds

stages.name: Stormcrusher
stages.description: Its massive wings create devastating pressure waves

stages.name: Tempetaur
stages.description: A sky titan whose wingspan blocks out the sun

stages.name: Airmote
stages.description: A mote of sentient air that hums with magical resonance

stages.name: Windweaver
stages.description: Weaves spells from wind itself, never running dry

stages.name: Galesage
stages.description: An eternal wind sage — its breath is pure concentrated mana

stages.name: Sparkfang
stages.description: A crackling pup whose bite carries a devastating electrical shock

stages.name: Voltslash
stages.description: Slashes with electrified claws that paralyze on contact

stages.name: Thunderwulf
stages.description: A wolf of living lightning — each howl splits the sky

stages.name: Staticfly
stages.description: A firefly that sparks with static electricity

stages.name: Boltgeist
stages.description: A spectral form composed entirely of ball lightning

stages.name: Plasmavault
stages.description: Contains the power of a thunderstorm in a single focused mind

stages.name: Shockpact
stages.description: A compact armadillo-like spirit charged with defensive electricity

stages.name: Voltshield
stages.description: Its electrified shell shocks anything that strikes it

stages.name: Dynamofort
stages.description: A living dynamo fortress — attackers receive as much as they give

stages.name: Pulsefoal
stages.description: A young hart whose antlers pulse with protective static

stages.name: Shockstag
stages.description: Creates an electromagnetic field that deflects hostile magic

stages.name: Ionward
stages.description: Projects an ionized barrier that nullifies magical attacks entirely

stages.name: Ziptail
stages.description: A tiny weasel-like spirit that moves at the speed of electricity

stages.name: Boltrunner
stages.description: Runs along power lines and strikes before thunder can follow

stages.name: Voltvalor
stages.description: Pure electrical impulse given form — strikes at the speed of thought

stages.name: Rumbletoad
stages.description: A stout toad whose croaks produce rolling thunder

stages.name: Thundercrusher
stages.description: Its footsteps are accompanied by deafening thunderclaps

stages.name: Volttitan
stages.description: A titan of thunder whose body stores entire lightning storms

stages.name: Sparklet
stages.description: A dancing spark that feeds on electromagnetic fields

stages.name: Arccaster
stages.description: Channels lightning through its body in an endless loop of power

stages.name: Voltsage
stages.description: An ancient electrical sage — its mana regenerates faster than it spends

stages.name: Frostfang
stages.description: A wolf pup with fangs of solid ice that never melt

stages.name: Glacierslash
stages.description: Its claws are glacial blades that freeze flesh on contact

stages.name: Cryowulf
stages.description: The arctic apex — its breath flash-freezes everything in range

stages.name: Snowmote
stages.description: A tiny ice crystal spirit that exudes an aura of deep cold

stages.name: Frostgeist
stages.description: A ghostly figure of frozen mist with devastating ice magic

stages.name: Glacialmind
stages.description: Its mind operates at absolute zero — perfect magical precision

stages.name: Icepact
stages.description: A compact ice crab with a shell of permafrost

stages.name: Permashield
stages.description: Encased in ice so thick that attacks simply shatter against it

stages.name: Cryofortress
stages.description: A walking glacier — the ultimate frozen bulwark

stages.name: Rimefoal
stages.description: A delicate fawn wreathed in shimmering rime frost

stages.name: Froststag
stages.description: Its crystalline antlers create a dome of cold that absorbs magic

stages.name: Tundraward
stages.description: Guardian of the frozen wastes — no spell can breach its icy aura

stages.name: Sleetpaw
stages.description: A tiny fox that slides across ice with effortless grace

stages.name: Hailrunner
stages.description: Leaves patterns of frost wherever it dashes — too fast to follow

stages.name: Blizzardvalor
stages.description: A crystalline blur — strikes with the piercing speed of a blizzard

stages.name: Frostlump
stages.description: A round, dense ball of compacted snow with surprising vitality

stages.name: Glaciercrusher
stages.description: An enormous ice bear that shrugs off punishment indefinitely

stages.name: Cryotaur
stages.description: An ancient ice titan — has endured since the last ice age

stages.name: Frostlet
stages.description: A tiny ice sprite that draws mana from the cold itself

stages.name: Cryocaster
stages.description: Commands ice with a bottomless reserve of cryogenic energy

stages.name: Glacialsage
stages.description: An ancient sage of winter whose spells cascade endlessly

stages.name: Gleamfang
stages.description: A radiant pup with fangs that shine like sunbeams

stages.name: Radiantclaw
stages.description: Its claws leave trails of burning light with every strike

stages.name: Solwulf
stages.description: A solar predator — its attacks are as blinding as they are brutal

stages.name: Prismite
stages.description: A floating crystal that refracts light into magical energy

stages.name: Haloglow
stages.description: Surrounded by a halo of pure light that powers its devastating spells

stages.name: Luminoracle
stages.description: An oracle of pure light — its visions become searing reality

stages.name: Dawnpact
stages.description: A tortoise with a shell that glows with morning light

stages.name: Luxshield
stages.description: Its shell is a prism of hardened light — nearly impervious

stages.name: Radiantfort
stages.description: A beacon of indestructible light that shields all who stand behind it

stages.name: Glintfoal
stages.description: A fawn whose coat glints with protective starlight

stages.name: Halostag
stages.description: Its halo-crowned antlers dispel curses and dark magic

stages.name: Celestward
stages.description: A celestial guardian that bathes allies in restorative starlight

stages.name: Flashtail
stages.description: A tiny bird of light that appears and vanishes in flashes

stages.name: Beamrunner
stages.description: Travels on beams of light — almost impossible to track

stages.name: Luxvalor
stages.description: Moves at the speed of light itself — ultimate velocity

stages.name: Dawnpaw
stages.description: A stout bear cub that radiates warmth and morning light

stages.name: Solarcrusher
stages.description: An enormous sun bear whose embrace crushes with gravitational force

stages.name: Lumintaur
stages.description: A titan of living sunlight — its body is an inexhaustible furnace

stages.name: Glowlet
stages.description: A softly glowing orb that feeds on ambient light energy

stages.name: Prismcaster
stages.description: Channels light through prismatic focus — its mana never wavers

stages.name: Luxsage
stages.description: A radiant sage of light whose magical reserves rival the sun itself

stages.name: Shadefang
stages.description: A shadow pup that strikes from darkness without warning

stages.name: Duskslash
stages.description: Merges with shadows, delivering devastating surprise attacks

stages.name: Voidwulf
stages.description: A wolf made of pure void — its attacks erase rather than cut

stages.name: Noxmote
stages.description: A mote of sentient darkness that whispers forbidden knowledge

stages.name: Umbraswirl
stages.description: A vortex of shadow magic that warps reality around it

stages.name: Abyssphantom
stages.description: An entity from the abyss — its magic unravels the laws of nature

stages.name: Murkpact
stages.description: A dense shadow creature with an impenetrable dark shell

stages.name: Voidshield
stages.description: Cloaked in void armor that absorbs energy from every attack

stages.name: Eclipsefort
stages.description: A fortress of eclipsed light — attacks pass through harmlessly

stages.name: Duskfoal
stages.description: A fawn of twilight that feeds on fading light

stages.name: Umbrastag
stages.description: Its shadowy antlers absorb and nullify hostile enchantments

stages.name: Nightward
stages.description: Cloaked in eternal night — no spell can pierce its darkness

stages.name: Flickshade
stages.description: A shadow that moves independently, darting between dark spaces

stages.name: Shadowrunner
stages.description: Runs through the shadow realm, emerging anywhere to strike

stages.name: Voidvalor
stages.description: Transcends space through void-walking — no location is safe

stages.name: Gloompaw
stages.description: A hulking shadow bear that absorbs light around it

stages.name: Nightcrusher
stages.description: An enormous creature of condensed darkness, devastatingly durable

stages.name: Abysstitan
stages.description: Born from the deepest void — its HP seems to have no limit

stages.name: Noxlet
stages.description: A tiny creature of night that feeds on ambient dark energy

stages.name: Shadowcaster
stages.description: Channels the void's infinite darkness into unending spellcasts

stages.name: Voidsage
stages.description: An eldritch sage of the void — its mana well is a black hole

fusionTable._doc: Each key is 'elementA+elementB' (alphabetical order). Result is the fusion species with dual typing. Stats at fusion are computed from parents' archetypes using fusionBlend formula in meta.

dark+fire.name: Hellfire
dark+fire.description: Born of darkness and flame — an unholy fusion of shadow fire

dark+water.name: Abyss
dark+water.description: The crushing darkness of the deep sea given sentient form

dark+earth.name: Grave
dark+earth.description: From buried depths, the earth's darkness rises

dark+wind.name: Phantom
dark+wind.description: A ghostly wind that chills the soul — neither alive nor dead

dark+lightning.name: Chaos
dark+lightning.description: Lightning corrupted by darkness — pure entropic destruction

dark+ice.name: Frostbite
dark+ice.description: A cold so deep it is indistinguishable from darkness

dark+light.name: Eclipse
dark+light.description: Light and dark in perfect balance — the rarest and most volatile fusion

earth+fire.name: Magma
earth+fire.description: Molten earth given form — slow, devastating, and near-indestructible

fire+water.name: Steam
fire+water.description: Where fire meets water — explosive pressure and scalding mist

fire+wind.name: Wildfire
fire+wind.description: Wind-fueled fire that spreads with terrifying speed

fire+lightning.name: Plasma
fire+lightning.description: Superheated lightning — the fourth state of matter made manifest

fire+ice.name: Thermal
fire+ice.description: Extreme heat and cold in unstable equilibrium — dangerously volatile

fire+light.name: Solar
fire+light.description: The fusing of flame and light creates a miniature sun

earth+water.name: Swamp
earth+water.description: Where earth and water merge — a stubborn, enduring marsh spirit

earth+wind.name: Dust
earth+wind.description: Erosion given will — wind and earth locked in eternal grinding dance

earth+lightning.name: Crystal
earth+lightning.description: Crystallized lightning trapped in stone — a piezoelectric wonder

earth+ice.name: Permafrost
earth+ice.description: Frozen earth that has stood for millennia — utterly immovable

earth+light.name: Life
earth+light.description: Light nourishes earth — the essence of growth and renewal

ice+water.name: Glacier
ice+water.description: Frozen seas and ancient ice — a slow, inexorable frozen tide

ice+light.name: Prism
ice+light.description: Light refracted through ice crystals — dazzling prismatic power

lightning+water.name: Surge
lightning+water.description: Electricity conducted through water — devastating and unpredictable

lightning+wind.name: Thunder
lightning+wind.description: The marriage of wind and lightning — the perfect storm

lightning+ice.name: Cryovolt
lightning+ice.description: Freezing electricity — a paradox of stillness and raw power

lightning+light.name: Nova
lightning+light.description: A stellar explosion of light and electricity — blinding devastation

water+wind.name: Storm
water+wind.description: Rain and wind combined — a living monsoon of elemental fury

water+light.name: Rainbow
water+light.description: Light dancing through water — a prismatic spirit of hope and power

wind+ice.name: Blizzard
wind+ice.description: Howling arctic gales carrying lethal ice — visibility zero

wind+light.name: Aurora
wind+light.description: Dancing lights on celestial winds — ethereal beauty masking raw power

fire+fire.name: Pure Flame
fire+fire.description: Two fires fused into one — pure, concentrated elemental flame

water+water.name: Pure Tide
water+water.description: The essence of water distilled — a perfect aquatic spirit

earth+earth.name: Pure Stone
earth+earth.description: Earth compressed to its purest form — absolute solidity

wind+wind.name: Pure Gale
wind+wind.description: Wind refined to its essence — the fastest thing alive

lightning+lightning.name: Pure Thunder
lightning+lightning.description: Pure electrical potential — raw energy seeking discharge

ice+ice.name: Pure Frost
ice+ice.description: Ice distilled to absolute zero — time itself slows nearby

light+light.name: Pure Radiance
light+light.description: Pure light incarnate — a being of absolute radiance

dark+dark.name: Pure Shadow
dark+dark.description: Pure darkness condensed — an entity of absolute void
